findings.description: grep -oP (GNU Perl regex) in devpod-sync-kubeconfig.sh fails on macOS BSD grep. Replaced with POSIX-compatible sed -nE.
findings.proposedRule: Shell scripts MUST use POSIX-compatible constructs — sed -nE instead of grep -oP

findings.description: Port-forwarding loop skipped all ports but SSH command still ran with zero -L flags, creating no-op background connection reported as success.
findings.proposedRule: Guard post-loop actions against empty iteration when loop items can be skipped

findings.description: postStartCommand.sh counted all pod lines (wc -l) including CrashLoopBackOff/Error/Pending as 'healthy'. Replaced with grep -c for Running/Completed.
findings.proposedRule: K8s pod health checks MUST filter for Running/Completed status

findings.description: .mcp.json used npx -y kubernetes-mcp-server@latest — supply-chain risk with auto-confirm flag.
findings.proposedRule: Pin exact versions for npx-invoked tools, never use @latest with -y
